title: Keepers of the Stones II: Epic Fight Compat
description: Seamlessly merge the magical elemental combat of Keepers of the Stones II with the dynamic fighting system of Epic Fight!
body:
# Keepers of the Stones II & Epic Fight Compatibility

Seamlessly merge the magical elemental combat of Keepers of the Stones II with the dynamic fighting system of Epic Fight! This essential compatibility addon resolves critical conflicts between these two popular mods, allowing players to fully experience both mods' features without crashes or broken mechanics.

## Key Features

- **Combat Animation Integration**: Ensures Keepers' magic weapon animations work flawlessly with Epic Fight's advanced combat system. 
- **Elemental Power Preservation**: All elemental stones from Keepers of the Stones II maintain their unique abilities while interacting correctly with Epic Fight's dodge and block mechanics.  
- **Weapon System Harmony**: Fixes conflicts between Keepers' temporary weapons (which come with vanishing curse) and Epic Fight's weapon handling system.  
- **Target Lock Compatibility**: Makes sure Keepers' elemental attacks function properly with Epic Fight's target lock system for focused combat. 
- **Zero Performance Impact**: Lightweight integration that adds no additional content or resource strain to your game. 

## Why You Need This

Without this compatibility layer, players would have to choose between mastering elemental magic stones that grant powerful abilities  or experiencing the soulslike combat depth that Epic Fight brings to Minecraft. This addon bridges the gap, letting you become a master of both elemental magic and advanced combat techniques in the same playthrough.

Perfect for adventurers who want to wield elemental powers while executing fluid dodges, blocks, and complex attack combinations without sacrificing either mod's unique gameplay experience.  

Simply install this addon alongside both mods to unlock the complete, harmonized experience that Minecraft combat enthusiasts have been waiting for!
